title: Invariant registry spec (descriptive registry)
description: Constrains spec/invariants.json — a DESCRIPTIVE registry of the pipeline invariants (I*, I-dod, AO-1..7, Limitations A..K) with their soundness tier, the validate_run.py label prefixes that mechanize them, backing fixtures, prose provenance, and doc anchors. Diffed at dev time by scripts/spec_check.py (SC1 tier/label-coverage policy, plus provenance/doc/fixture cross-checks) against references/state-machine.md §4/§5, references/self-learning-loops.md §5, DESIGN.md §4/§6, formal-models.md, and the hoisted validate_run.py LABELS table. This schema is NOT read by validate_run.py and adds NO constraint to the run-validation path (PRESERVES every guarantee). The 'label prefixes empty only for non-mechanical tiers' rule is SC1 POLICY, deliberately NOT encoded here — the schema stays permissive so validator_label_prefixes MAY be empty for any tier.

$comment.description: OPTIONAL. Free-form caveat that this file is descriptive/diffed, never enforced by validate_run.py.

note.description: OPTIONAL. Alias of $comment for the 'descriptive, not enforced' caveat.

id.description: Invariant id, e.g. 'I1', 'I1b', 'I-dod', 'AO-2', or a Limitation letter 'A'..'K'. Format policy is an SC concern, not a schema constraint.

title.description: Short human-readable statement of the invariant.

tier.description: Soundness tier: mechanical (checked in validate_run.py), schema (JSON-Schema-enforced), attestation (self-attested flag), discipline (process rule, not mechanized), semantic (a documented Limitation A..K).

validator_label_prefixes.description: The validate_run.py LABELS prefixes that mechanize this invariant (byte-identical label stems). MAY be empty — the 'empty allowed only for non-mechanical tiers' rule is SC1 policy, intentionally not a schema constraint.

fixtures.description: Paths of test fixtures (under scripts/tests/) that exercise this invariant. MAY be empty.

provenance.description: Canonical prose provenance sites (file + section/line span) the invariant is derived from. MAY be empty.

docs.description: Doc anchors for the invariant, each 'file#anchor' or 'file:section'. MAY be empty.

entries.description: The invariant registry, one closed object per invariant.
